Scheme Name: PMMSY: Establishment of Medium RAS / Biofloc culture system - Haryana
Description: The scheme provides capital assistance to fish farmers and entrepreneurs for establishing medium-scale Recirculatory Aquaculture Systems (RAS) and Biofloc systems.
Category: Agriculture,Rural & Environment, Social welfare & Empowerment
State: Haryana
Ministry: 
Level: State
Tags: Aquaculture, RAS, Biofloc Systems, Fish, Farming

Scheme Name: National Centre for Communication Security (NCCS) Research Associates Scheme
Description: NCCS engages young scholars as Research Associates  to contribute in development of Telecom Security eco system with in India by providing an opportunity to them to work in areas like Telecom Security Standard development, Lab recognition and Security Certification of telecom products.
Category: Skills & Employment, Science, IT & Communications
State: All
Ministry: Ministry Of Communication
Level: Central
Tags: Cybersecurity, Research, Telecommunications, Bengaluru, ITSAR, DoT
